parameters.subject: =New Invoice Processed: {{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.invoice_number }} — {{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.vendor_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Invoice Successfully Processed

A new invoice has been automatically extracted from Google Drive and saved to Google Sheets.

FieldValue
Invoice #{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.invoice_number }}
Invoice Date{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.invoice_date }}
Due Date{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.due_date || 'N/A' }}
Vendor{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.vendor_name }}
Vendor Email{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.vendor_email || 'N/A' }}
Bill To{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.bill_to_company }}
Subtotal{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.currency }} {{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.subtotal }}
Tax{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.currency }} {{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.tax_amount }}
Total Amount{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.currency }} {{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.total_amount }}
Payment Terms{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.payment_terms || 'N/A' }}
Source File{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.source_file }}
Processed At{{ $('Parse & Validate Invoice').item.json.processed_at }}

View all invoices in Google Sheets

gmailOAuth2.id: REPLACE_HERE — your n8n Gmail OAuth2 credential ID (see README Step 7.3)
gmailOAuth2.name: Gmail account

parameters.subject: =Invoice Processing Failed: {{ $json.source_file }}
parameters.message:
=

Invoice Processing Failed

A new invoice file was uploaded to Google Drive but could not be processed automatically.

FieldValue
File Name{{ $json.source_file }}
Error{{ $json.error }}
Time{{ $now.toISO() }}

Please review the file manually and add the invoice data to Google Sheets.
